description: FullStory digital experience analytics connector — syncs session recordings, users, and segments. Provides direct access to custom events per user via the FullStory REST API v2.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: FullStory is a digital experience analytics platform that captures session recordings, heatmaps, and user behavior data. This connector reads users, user segments, and provides access to session recordings and custom events from the FullStory REST API v2.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content: Authentication uses a Bearer token passed in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer {api_key}). Obtain your API key from FullStory Settings → Integrations → API Keys. The key is verified via a GET /v2/org call during install.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your FullStory API Bearer token. Found under Settings → Integrations → API Keys.

items.name: sync
items.description: Full sync of users and segments

items.name: list_sessions
items.description: List session recordings, optionally filtered by user UID

items.name: get_session
items.description: Retrieve a single session recording by ID

items.name: get_user
items.description: Retrieve a single user by UID

items.name: list_events
items.description: List custom events for a specific user UID

items.name: users
items.description: Identified users and their custom properties

items.name: segments
items.description: User segments defined in the FullStory project

sections.title: Pagination
sections.content: FullStory uses cursor-based pagination. Responses include a nextPageToken field. Pass pageToken=<token> in subsequent requests. The connector exposes the cursor parameter on all list methods.

sections.title: Rate Limits
sections.content: FullStory enforces per-organization rate limits on REST API v2. The connector retries automatically on 429 responses using exponential backoff with jitter (base 1s, max 30s). Auth errors are not retried.
